object_type: frozen prediction-vector interface for ACT, Planck, DESI, BAO, CMB, lensing, and matter-power observables
purpose: Bind the observable output slots required after the DFM-MKC linear perturbation system while explicitly deferring numerical Boltzmann solving, likelihood evaluation, and empirical comparison to downstream executable objects.

input_parameter_block.fit_status: No parameters are fit in this object.

required_background_solver_outputs.status: Required solver outputs are specified but not numerically supplied.

required_perturbation_solver_outputs.status: Transfer-function slots are specified but not numerically supplied.

prediction_vector_slots.status: Slots are declared only; no numerical vector is produced.

observable_maps.cmb_temperature: Map DFM-MKC metric and photon transfer functions into C_ell_TT source functions.
observable_maps.cmb_polarization: Map photon quadrupole and visibility source functions into C_ell_TE and C_ell_EE slots.
observable_maps.cmb_lensing: Map Weyl-potential transfer functions into lensing-potential spectra.
observable_maps.bao: Map background distance functions and sound horizon proxy into DESI BAO slots.
observable_maps.matter_power: Map matter transfer functions and primordial spectrum into P_k_linear, sigma8, and f_sigma8 slots.
observable_maps.weak_lensing: Map matter and Weyl-potential spectra into shear and galaxy-lensing spectra.
observable_maps.implementation_status: Formal observable-map slots only; no validated numerical implementation.

next_admissible_step: Supply DFM_MKC_DATA_COMPARISON_PROTOCOL_V1 as a frozen comparison protocol without running empirical validation.
